stemHtml:
What are some of the features on the EFIS control panel that can be used to aid pilots in maintaining situational awareness?

1. Display surrounding targets Traffic Collision Avoidance System (TCAS)
2. Indication of the aircraft's position in relation to terrain
3. Selection of avoidance routes for bad weather
4. Real-time display of the cabin crew's activities and movements
5. Selection of preferred cabin lighting and temperature settings
